title: Cors
description: Cross-origin resource sharing (CORS) settings for a function URL

AllowCredentials.description: Whether to allow cookies or other credentials

AllowHeaders.description: The HTTP headers allowed in requests

AllowOrigins.description: The origins allowed to access the function URL

ExposeHeaders.description: The HTTP headers exposed in the response

MaxAge.description: Maximum time in seconds that a browser can cache results of a preflight request
